I have had zero issues with this in the last two years I have owned it. Highly recommended.

They just keep impressing me and I am a customer for life.

reviews.title: Great Bluetooth speaker
reviews.text: I love it! It a great Bluetooth speaker, good battery time
reviews.author: Leonor

reviews.title: Great Sound!
reviews.text: Unless you're wealthy you can't have everything, but this will get you pretty close. Waterproof, dustproof, compact and great sound as long as you don't go all audiophile and pick it apart. It's great NOT perfect. It pairs quickly and easily. It has a good range so the source can be some distance from the speaker. It has a charging outlet to charge a device and good battery life. The surface it is set upon can have a nice or not so nice effect on the sound so try different surfaces. Used in backyard with Pandora had no problems with quality, connection or volume. It's not going to blast the feathers of a pigeon and it shouldn't--not what it's designed for. It's a great unit, would definitely buy another.
reviews.author: customer

reviews.title: great sound in small pkg
reviews.text: I tried several small Bluetooth speakers from $50 to $150 ,sale prices, and this speaker has better sound than klipsh and all others I tried. good bottom end and plenty of full range sound.plenty loud without distortion . I like it . good battery life ,about 12-15 hours
reviews.author: dumr

reviews.title: Thought I got a great deal...
reviews.text: Reg price $200. Not for the sound quality. No bass. It is very loud and very good for going to beach or pool. Good thing I got it at a very discounted price.

reviews.title: Very Reliable
reviews.text: Nice full sound. Very impressed with battery life. Never a problem when it gets wet. It just floats until you pick it up.
reviews.author: sppix

reviews.title: Nice Speaker for most
reviews.text: Purchased this speaker on sale. Speaker connects quickly and provides remaining battery life. My only concern is that I had hoped the speaker would have played at a louder volume. If you don't like to blast your music, the speaker will serve you well.
reviews.author: RRRR

reviews.title: What a deal!!!
reviews.text: I have a similar product which I paid 5x more. The quality and performance of my altec is superior. I should have ordered 2!!!
reviews.author: 3XLatina

reviews.title: Great sound, battery life seems very good
reviews.text: Love the sound, battery life seems great so far, taking camping soon, anxious to see true hours in real life.
reviews.author: Bob1978

reviews.title: Altec Lansing - Boom Jacket Bluetooth Speaker
reviews.text: Small size, big sound. The battery lasts a very long time. The bass is lacking, but I still think it sounds great. Over wifi and Sprints new unlimited plans, the music from Pandora and Youtube sounds really good, especially on the vacations we took this year. As a plus the boom jacket even has hookups to attach to the rack of a 4-wheeler. But I didn't get to try it out due to Sprint not having any data where I was riding. Its rugged, waterproof, beach proof, life proof. Excellent product, now if only everyone in my family liked Alice N Chains, or Tool, I would be happy.
reviews.author: Sloth34

reviews.title: Nice little speaker.
reviews.text: This is a nice little speaker. Not a lot of bass but considering the size of the speaker, as good as could be expected. Sounds good even at a fairly loud volume. Haven't had any experience with testing the battery life but so far so good. It has some nice accessories included; a clamp to hold the speaker to a handlebar or something similar, an auxiliary cable which can be plugged into the speaker instead of Bluetooth, and the charger cable. I was able to get this speaker at a great price ($50) well worth it. Overall very satisfied.
reviews.author: theC1

reviews.title: A beast speaker for outdoor activity
reviews.text:
I like how the speaker is still playing when being submerged in the water. The bass it creates make such cool and interesting visual. 
Can't wait to bring this on to my beach vacation

reviews.title: Great sound, issues connecting on occasion
reviews.text: Excellent sound, very durable. Took an a kayaking trip and it survived very well. However once in awhile I have issue pairing with my phone, the speaker will just shut off after it gets paired. Very strange, overall when it connects, it's a very good product.
